title: Prismatic Rain
caption: Vivid neon signage mirrored in rain-soaked asphalt after a midnight downpour.
story: Rain in Shinjuku turns asphalt into a liquid canvas. Standing beneath the overhang of a closed alley bar, the reflection of blue and magenta signs created an abstract grid of liquid light.
curatorNote: Vibrant color palette. High contrast neon glow makes this a top candidate for volume cover.
altText: Rain wet city pavement reflecting bright pink and cyan neon lights at night.
